title: Actual Budget Revenues, Iran, 1958/59 (World Bank, 1960)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION, not bulk download. Original document is a 1960 scanned World Bank report (data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf) with a poor-quality OCR text layer (garbled digits in places). Every value in this file was verified by rendering the exact source page (Table 12, page 47) to a high-resolution PNG (pdftoppm -r 200) and visually reading the table directly from the image. The image was clean and unambiguous throughout. Every subtotal and the grand total were independently re-summed from the line items and matched the printed figures exactly (Indirect taxes 7434.8+1376.2+3364.8+756.5=12932.3; Others 514.2+473.1+501.4+600.0+113.1+94.2+485.2=2781.2; tax+other revenue subtotal 3725.5+12932.3+2781.2=19439.0; grand total 19439.0+6781.8+1000.0+1000.0=28220.8), confirming the transcription. No value was interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
notes: Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf — Table 12, page 47, source: Ministry of Finance, Tehran. Per footnote 1/: figures do not include Special Revenues (budgeted at Rls 1,198 million), so not directly comparable with the revenue table on page 9. The CSV uses a group/line_item long format to mirror the source's nested category structure (Direct taxes, Indirect taxes, Others, then non-tax transfers, then grand total); 'Subtotal' rows correspond to the printed subtotal figures in the right-hand column of the original table. Part of a systematic effort to extract Pahlavi-era (esp. 1941-1960) data from primary-source PDFs already in data/raw/.
